set-variable.name: cacheKey

set-header.name: Retry-After

otherwise.return-response:
<set-status code="@{
						var sc = context.Response.StatusCode;
						return (sc >= 400 && sc < 600) ? sc : 500;
					}" reason="@(context.Response.StatusReason ?? "Internal Server Error")" />
					
						application/json
					
					@{
						var statusCode = context.Response.StatusCode;
						string code;
						string message;
						if (statusCode == 401) {
							code = "UNAUTHORIZED";
							message = "Invalid or missing API key.";
						} else {
							code = "INTERNAL_ERROR";
							message = context.LastError.Message ?? "An unexpected gateway error occurred.";
						}
						return new JObject(
							new JProperty("code", code),
							new JProperty("message", message),
							new JProperty("timestamp", DateTime.UtcNow.ToString("o")),
							new JProperty("traceId", context.RequestId),
							new JProperty("path", context.Request.Url.Path)
						).ToString();
					}
